title: De Novo Classification Request for ECG App DEN180044
claim_supported: A representative regulated consumer single-lead ECG app document describes rhythm-screening centered on sinus rhythm and atrial fibrillation; this is a product-specific example rather than a claim about all wearables
notes: Report sections 1.1 and 8.7 use this only for functional-scope background; no sensitivity/specificity or commercial comparison is imported

title: 2018 ACC/AHA/HRS Guideline on Bradycardia and Cardiac Conduction Delay
claim_supported: Ambulatory ECG monitoring duration is selected according to symptom frequency; 24/48-hour Holter and longer modalities are established contexts
notes: Report sections 1.1 and 1.3 use this only for conservative long-duration motivation; not a performance comparator

title: MIT-BIH Normal Sinus Rhythm Database v1.0.0
claim_supported: NSR-class records originate from fixed version nsrdb 1.0.0; DOI 10.13026/C2NK5R; file license ODC-By 1.0
notes: Raw files are fetched from PhysioNet and not bundled; standard PhysioNet citation required

title: BIDMC Congestive Heart Failure Database v1.0.0
